name: AMGEN INC
summary: Amgen Inc. is a leading independent biotechnology company that discovers, develops, manufactures, and delivers innovative human therapeutics. Founded in 1980, it operates in approximately 100 countries and focuses on areas of high unmet medical need. Key products include Prolia, XGEVA, Repatha, Otezla, TEZSPIRE, TEPEZZA, KRYSTEXXA, UPLIZNA, IMDELLTRA, and MariTide, targeting cardiovascular disease, osteoporosis, inflammation, oncology, and rare diseases.

products.name: Prolia
products.description: RANKL antibody for treatment of osteoporosis in postmenopausal women and men at high risk of fracture.

products.name: XGEVA
products.description: Same active ingredient as Prolia but approved for different oncology-related bone indications.

products.name: Repatha
products.description: PCSK9 inhibitor indicated to reduce major adverse cardiovascular events and LDL-C in adults.

products.name: Otezla
products.description: Oral PDE4 inhibitor approved for plaque psoriasis, psoriatic arthritis, Behçet's disease oral ulcers.

products.name: TEZSPIRE
products.description: Biologic approved as add-on maintenance for severe asthma and chronic rhinosinusitis with nasal polyps.

products.name: TEPEZZA
products.description: Treatment for moderate-to-severe thyroid eye disease; acquired via Horizon acquisition in 2023.

products.name: KRYSTEXXA
products.description: Treatment product acquired through Horizon acquisition in October 2023.

products.name: UPLIZNA
products.description: First and only FDA-approved treatment for IgG4-RD; also approved for generalized myasthenia gravis in adults.

products.name: IMDELLTRA/IMDYLLTRA
products.description: Bispecific T-cell engager fully approved for extensive-stage small cell lung cancer after platinum-based chemotherapy.

products.name: TAVNEOS
products.description: Adjunctive treatment for severe active ANCA-associated vasculitis; subject to FDA voluntary withdrawal request in 2026.

products.name: MariTide (maridebart cafraglutide)
products.description: Antibody-peptide conjugate activating GLP-1 and antagonizing GIPR; in Phase 3 for chronic weight management and related conditions.

products.name: Bemarituzumab
products.description: Investigated in Phase 3 for first-line gastric cancer; company decided not to pursue regulatory approval in 2026.

products.name: Rocatinlimab
products.description: Collaboration with Kyowa Kirin; control transitioned to Kyowa Kirin in early 2026.

partnerships.description: Partnership to sell products in the Asia Pacific region.
Partnership to sell products in the Asia Pacific region.

Partnership to sell products in the Asia Pacific region.
Asia Pacific product sales partner; also assumed global control of rocatinlimab development and commercialization in 2026.
Amgen acquired Otezla from BMS in November 2019 following BMS's acquisition of Celgene.
